query:
SELECT 
  qi.id,
  qi.itemNumber,
  qi.itemType,
  SUBSTRING(qi.description, 1, 50) as desc_preview,
  qi.createdAt
FROM quotationItems qi
WHERE qi.quotationId = '4440001'
ORDER BY qi.id ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT 
  qi.id,
  qi.itemNumber,
  qi.itemType,
  SUBSTRING(qi.description, 1, 50) as desc_preview,
  qi.createdAt
FROM quotationItems qi
WHERE qi.quotationId = '4440001'
ORDER BY qi.id ASC;
